# zstack_baremetal_instance (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage baremetal instances in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `chassis_uuid` (String) The chassis UUID.
- `image_uuid` (String) The image UUID.
- `name` (String) The name of the baremetal instance.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The instance login password.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the baremetal instance.
- `strategy` (String) The provisioning strategy.
- `template_uuid` (String) The template UUID.
- `username` (String) The login username.

### Read-Only

- `management_ip` (String) The management IP.
- `platform` (String) The platform.
- `port` (Number) The management port.
- `state` (String) The state.
- `status` (String) The status.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the baremetal instance.
